EXAMPLE 2:
The next 137 bottles of PRODUCT are
reserved for readers of this letter…
… but you must act before they run out of stock!
PRODUCT is so powerful and so effective that word has already got out…
Women across America are discovering this 	incredible 	formula 	for
themselves…
And they’re ordering six or more bottles at time…
That way they don’t just burn fat in the short-term…
But they keep their METABOLISM activated for month-after-month.
It sounds kind of crazy…
But it makes sense…
Especially because there is just so much research showing that when it
comes to the ingredients inside PRODUCT…
The longer you use them…
The more pounds you can see melt off…
And the more invigorated your metabolism and thyroid hormones are.
It’s so empowering to see my fellow sisters stepping up and taking control
of THEIR bodies…
And their physical beauty…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

4	Stefan G eorgi
MODULE 10	AOV Money Close Example 2
But of course with so many women choosing to order multiple bottles of
PRODUCT at a time…
This often means that demand sometimes outpaces supply…
And DOCTOR and the team at COMPANY are always at risk of running out
of bottles…
Which means, women are forced to wait up to three months until the next
batch is produced.
I’d hate for that to happen…
Imagine finally being able to throw off that unwanted fat, like you’re casting
aside a wet, smelly blanket…
But then, when you come back to this website to get your next month’s
supply…
You see a big message in the top right corner that says: “Out of Stock.”
It’s not even worth risking…
So I’ve spoken with DOCTOR and he’s promised to reserve the next batch
for folks who order through this letter.
As long as you’re one of the first 137 people who order today, you’ll be able
to reserve up to six bottles of PRODUCT.
That means you can go ahead and stock up on a 6, 3, or 1 month supply of
PRODUCT today…
Assuming you don’t see “Out Of Stock” anywhere on this page…
And the great news is that the more PRODUCT you decide to invest in right
now…
The more you save.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

You see, while PRODUCT has a suggested retail price of $69 (which is an
absolute steal in its own right)…
On this website only…

Plus I’ve also gotten DOCTOR and the team at COMPANY to agree to provide

It’s not quite as big as that six-bottle discount, but it’s still quite a savings…
And on top of that…
DOCTOR and COMPANY are going to pay your shipping when you order
today as well, as long as you’re in the U.S. So that means you don’t pay
anything for delivery!
(Oh, and I know how annoying it can be to order something online, only to
be charged every month automatically. So I’ve made sure that you won’t be
charged again unless you make another order.)
Though I urge you to be quick. This batch will be snapped up in no time at
all. Plus…
It’s guaranteed you’ll
start melting away fat within a matter of weeks --
or you won’t pay a penny!
The experts at COMPANY will get your order of PRODUCT in the mail as
soon as you reserve your bottles.
It usually takes just 3-5 business days to arrive.
When the delivery man knocks on your door, I’m sure you’ll want to tear
open the package and try it for yourself right away.
So go ahead.

MODULE 10	AOV Money Close Example 2
Squeeze the droplets up and apply them under your tongue.
Then do it again every morning.
You’ll notice a difference with each day that goes by.
You’ll feel more relaxed than ever. The fat around your neck will deflate
away. Your arms and legs will tighten up. And the weight that’s clung on to
your belly will melt off.
Within the first month, people will be telling you that you’ve never looked so
good…
After 3 months, people will begin to mistake you for a woman half your age.
They’ll be surprised that a hot mom like you looks so good!
Your friends, family, and colleagues will BEG you to share your bottle of
PRODUCT with them. In fact, they’ll pay you any price!
And after 6 months, if you live in a college town like I do, don’t be surprised
if a frat boy tries to chat you up. Of course, I’d never date a younger man,
but it’s a nice compliment!
Yet, if you’re not 100% amazed…
If your family and friends AREN’T telling you how amazing you look…
Then COMPANY has promised to offer you a full, prompt refund at any point
within your first 180 days of using PRODUCT.
They won’t ask you why. And won’t make you post anything back.
Simply put, you ONLY pay if you’re totally convinced it works for you.
Sound good? Then place your order of PRODUCT by choosing from the six-
month, three-month, or one-month options below. Just click on the package
you want. You’ll be taken to an order page to review your order.
